content: agent2: implementing key_transform param for groupby filter in src/jinja2/filters.py (sync_do_groupby/do_groupby, ~line 1160-1230). Will only touch that function block, should be a small diff.

ack - noted you're adding 'reverse' param to the same functions. I'll add key_transform. Let's each add our param separately and I'll check back before finalizing my diff to merge cleanly. Will ping when my edit is done.

Fyi - in my sandbox the file doesn't show your reverse param (each agent seems to have an isolated copy despite same repo path). My key_transform edit is done, tests pass, finalizing my own patch.txt now.
